IGUI_PFShowMatrixAxisTooltip: Whether or not to display the fluid matrix to the left of the world context menu
IGUI_PFMatrixAxisTooltip:
Unchecked: each row shares a world Y coordinate.
Checked: transposed -- rows follow the Y axis instead.
IGUI_PFPoolBarPositionTooltip: Where the combined pool bar (total of all connected barrels, separated by fluid type) sits around the 3x3 Connected Barrels grid.
IGUI_PFSpawnTestRigTooltip: Adds a debug/admin-only right-click option that CLEARS a %1x%2 area (two floors!) and builds the PlumbingFixed barrel/sink test rig there. For mod development only -- DO NOT ENABLE unless you know what you are doing. In multiplayer this requires admin access.
